notes: WARNING: Multiple sources list this course under 'Khao Yai' region, not Bangkok. The course is in Pak Chong district, Nakhon Ratchasima (~180 km from Bangkok). Region assignment follows pipeline task spec — verify if this should be moved to khao-yai region. Green fees vary by source (1,000/2,000 THB on 1golf.eu; 1,050/1,850 on golfsavers.com; 2,000/3,000 THB reported in 2025 search snippet). Golfsavers and 1golf.eu figures appear more recent. Caddie fee not separately published — greenfee365.com states 'Greenfee includes Caddy' implying caddie is bundled. Cart is THB 600 per golforient.com/golfasian.

green_fee_weekday_thb.note: 1golf.eu shows 1,000 THB weekday; golfsavers.com shows 1,050 THB; a 2025 web snippet reported 2,000 THB weekday — rates may have changed. Recommend verification.

green_fee_weekend_thb.note: 1golf.eu shows 2,000 THB weekend; golfsavers.com shows 1,850 THB. Recommend verification.

caddie_fee_thb.note: greenfee365.com states 'Greenfee includes Caddy' — caddie may be bundled in green fee rather than charged separately. Caddie tip of 400 THB/18 holes noted on monkeytravel.com.

caddie_required.note: greenfee365.com states 'Greenfee includes Caddy'; thailandgolfers.com lists caddie as compulsory.

cart_required.note: Cart listed as available at THB 600 but no source explicitly states it is mandatory.

phone.note: Multiple numbers found: 044-756-210 (main), 088-375-4466 (golf line), 088-378-2324. Primary listed as +66 44 756 210.

latitude.note: Deemples: 14.6388709; baigolf.com: 14.640135. Average used: 14.6395. Both sources consistent — located in Pak Chong district, Nakhon Ratchasima.

drive_time_from_bangkok_min.note: baigolf.com reports 2h 14min from central Bangkok; golforient.com says 1.5 hours; monkeytravel.com says 2h30m from Suvarnabhumi. Using 2h15m (135 min) as representative off-peak estimate.

google_maps_url.note: No direct Google Maps CID URL found. Address: 333/2 Moo 12, Khanong Phra, Pak Chong District, Nakhon Ratchasima 30130.
